## Adapter Target

Which environment should the adapter support?

- Agent or tool:
- Expected skill directory layout:
- How skills are triggered:

## Public Material Boundary

Adapter requests may include public docs, synthetic examples, or cleared snippets only.

Do not submit private projects, client work, unreleased roadmaps, internal prompts, private overlays, credentials, local workspace paths, or private tool logs.

You may use real projects in your own environment, but keep those materials out of this public repository.

## Requested Behavior

What should the adapter help users do?

## Validation

How should the adapter be checked without private material?

- [ ] Synthetic/public sample works.
- [ ] No private project information is required.
- [ ] The adapter does not require committing private overlay content.
